That message comes from `handle_no_index` in `src/inject.rs:334`, which triggers when no project DB exists, there are more than 5 indexable files, and total LOC exceeds 5,000. The project has 349 files (~31k LOC) and no index.

that's a stupid design -- it should just start indexing in the background -- why wait or why ask cluade code or why show a bunch of files? -- if it doesn't have anything useful to say it shouldn't say anything
Updated `handle_no_index` to silently start the daemon when there are more than 5 indexable files, removing the file listing and prompts.
